evidence: I love slashers and this was a well done slasher.
I am a big slasher fan and I own all the great ones and bad ones.
The story was easy to follow and I liked the little girl added to the adult guy's story.
The acting was good and I have seen a lot of horror films and this if deff one you can watch over and over again.
It's a fun movie only an hr and a half and it has a good pace.
There was plenty of gore and suspense.
The acting was bad even for a small indy film.
The killer was not scary he was a joke and a half.
Jamie Bernadette was awesome in this film and we are looking at a new horror scream queen.
Tobin Bell added a lot to this Franchise and didn't phone it in.
It was scary and a supernatural film done right.
This movie gets 5 stars for acting and effort though it lacks the story as it gets too confusing.
I liked the ending for me it was a strong point of the film and how horror films sometimes need to end.
This movie to me is 5 stars coming from a horror junkie.

summary: The user is a dedicated horror and slasher film fan, showing a strong preference for fast-paced, straightforward narratives. They appreciate strong performances from actors and have a low sensitivity to production quality, focusing more on the entertainment value of the films.
